stories.title: Single-device onboarding evidence contract smoke
stories.scope: Implement the minimal Device V2 onboarding evidence contract for one device. Store action results under device_v2_store_run.summary_json.onboarding.actions, add strict typed helpers for monitor/log onboarding actions, and add local config-file definitions for area syslog service and Linux system-log first_existing paths.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add a new orchestration state table, workflow engine, migrations, global API semantics, global styles, dependency upgrades, fallback defaults, or mock/pseudo success. Do not modify the formal d2on story queue as part of this smoke run.
acceptance: Onboarding actions are typed and include category, target, method, status, timestamp, operator/action evidence, and explicit error detail when failed or unknown.
Retry planning skips success actions and selects only failed or unknown ensure actions.
Missing or invalid onboarding config fails loudly with a concrete error; no silent defaults are introduced.
Linux system-log strategy is represented as first_existing for /var/log/syslog, /var/log/auth.log, /var/log/messages, and /var/log/secure.
Relevant development documents under docs/development/device-v2-onboarding-observability/ are updated when needed.
Focused backend tests cover action merge, retry selection, and invalid config behavior.
notes: Use the PRD as authority; do not infer syslog/SNMP trap area-service semantics beyond the explicit config contract.
This story exists only to evaluate glm behavior under the existing execution-pack mechanism.
